text:
4) RR_BRD_EXCLSN_IND_SW to IP,SNF, HH, Hospice and OP base claims, and LINE_RR_BRD_EXCLSN_IND_SW to DME line; 5) CLM_IP_INITL_MS_DRG_CD to IP base file; and 6) DMERC_LINE_FRGN_ADR_IND to DME line. 

Also changed the name of the HHA base field FINL_STD_AMT to be PPS_STD_VAL_PYMT_AMT.
43149 All Initial release of February 2018 version of Record Layout for Medicare Fee-For-Service Claims, Version K with CR13 updates.
